name: default
description: Default test prompt set: 30 prompts across 5 categories (6 per category). All sprites specify viewpoint for consistency. Difficulty tiers: simple (32x32), medium (48x48), hard (64x64).

prompts.prompt: top-down military tank with visible tracks, hull, and turret with barrel pointing up
prompts.hint: Should have distinct tracks on each side, a central hull, and a turret with barrel on top
prompts.colorHints: olive green hull, dark grey tracks, darker green turret

prompts.prompt: side-view red sports car facing right with visible wheels, low profile, and tinted windows
prompts.hint: Should have wheels, body, windows, and a low sporty profile. Front of car on the right side
prompts.colorHints: bright red body, dark grey wheels, light blue tinted windows

prompts.prompt: top-down blue pickup truck facing up with cab, open truck bed, and four visible wheels
prompts.hint: Should have a cab at the top, open truck bed below, four wheels visible, and clear front/back orientation
prompts.colorHints: blue body, dark grey wheels, brown truck bed floor

prompts.prompt: side-view yellow school bus facing left with multiple windows, flat front, and black wheels
prompts.hint: Should have a long rectangular body, multiple windows in a row, wheels, and a flat front on the left
prompts.colorHints: bright yellow body, black wheels and bumpers, light blue windows

prompts.prompt: top-down small green go-kart facing right with driver helmet visible
prompts.hint: Should have a compact body, four small wheels at corners, and a round helmet visible from above
prompts.colorHints: green body, black wheels, red helmet

prompts.prompt: side-view wooden sailboat facing right with triangular white sail and brown hull on blue water
prompts.hint: Should have a curved brown hull sitting on water, a mast, and a triangular white sail
prompts.colorHints: brown wooden hull, white sail, blue water line

prompts.prompt: front-facing pixel art knight holding a sword in one hand and a shield in the other, wearing silver armour
prompts.hint: Should have helmet, armor body, humanoid proportions, shield on one side, sword on the other
prompts.colorHints: silver armour, grey shield with emblem, metallic sword blade

prompts.prompt: front-facing wizard with tall pointed purple hat, flowing blue robes, and holding a glowing staff
prompts.hint: Should have a tall pointed hat, robes, humanoid proportions, and a staff with a glowing tip
prompts.colorHints: purple hat, blue robes, golden staff with white glow

prompts.prompt: front-facing skeleton warrior with visible ribcage, skull head, and holding a bone club
prompts.hint: Should have a visible ribcage, skull head, bony limbs, and a crude club weapon in one hand
prompts.colorHints: off-white bones, dark eye sockets, tan bone club

prompts.prompt: front-facing dwarf blacksmith with thick beard, leather apron, and hammer raised overhead
prompts.hint: Should have a stocky proportioned body (wider and shorter), prominent beard, apron, and a large hammer
prompts.colorHints: brown beard, dark leather apron, grey hammer head

prompts.prompt: front-facing hooded rogue with dark cloak, visible dagger at hip, and glowing eyes under hood
prompts.hint: Should have a hooded figure with most of the face hidden, a dark flowing cloak, and a small dagger visible at the hip
prompts.colorHints: dark grey cloak, green glowing eyes, silver dagger

prompts.prompt: front-facing peasant farmer holding a pitchfork with straw hat and brown overalls
prompts.hint: Should have a simple humanoid figure with a straw hat, overalls, and a pitchfork held vertically
prompts.colorHints: yellow straw hat, brown overalls, grey pitchfork

prompts.prompt: top-down grass ground tile with subtle texture variation and scattered tiny flowers
prompts.hint: Should tile seamlessly when repeated, use 2-3 shades of green with small detail patches for individual blades
prompts.colorHints: 2-3 shades of green, tiny yellow or white flower dots

prompts.prompt: top-down water tile with organic curved wave pattern and white foam highlights
prompts.hint: Should use blues and white highlights in curved organic shapes to suggest gentle waves, not straight lines. Must tile when repeated
prompts.colorHints: deep blue, medium blue, light blue, white foam highlights

prompts.prompt: top-down sandy desert tile with small scattered rocks and wind-swept ripples
prompts.hint: Should use warm yellows and tans with a few darker speckles for pebbles. Must tile when repeated
prompts.colorHints: warm yellow sand, tan variations, dark brown pebbles

prompts.prompt: top-down cobblestone road tile with irregular rounded stones and dark mortar lines
prompts.hint: Should have irregular rounded stone shapes with darker mortar lines between them. Must tile when repeated
prompts.colorHints: grey stones with slight colour variation, dark grey mortar

prompts.prompt: top-down snowy ground tile with footprint impressions and ice patches
prompts.hint: Should be mostly white with subtle blue-grey shadows for depth, a few footprint depressions, and slightly shinier ice patches
prompts.colorHints: white snow, light blue shadows, pale blue ice patches

prompts.prompt: top-down lava tile with glowing orange cracks on dark rock surface
prompts.hint: Should have a dark rock surface with bright orange-yellow glowing cracks running through it. Must tile when repeated
prompts.colorHints: dark grey/black rock, bright orange lava, yellow glow edges

prompts.prompt: wooden crate with metal corner brackets and plank grain texture, angled to show front face and top
prompts.hint: Should have wood plank texture on the front face, a visible top face for depth, and small metal brackets at corners
prompts.colorHints: warm brown wood planks, dark grey metal brackets

prompts.prompt: treasure chest with gold trim, closed lid, and ornate lock, angled to show front face and top
prompts.hint: Should have a rounded lid, dark wood body, gold lock and trim details, with visible front and top faces
prompts.colorHints: dark brown wood, gold trim and lock, brass hinges

prompts.prompt: front-view red health potion in a round glass bottle with a cork stopper
prompts.hint: Should have a round glass bottle shape with red liquid visible inside, a cork stopper at the top, and a small label
prompts.colorHints: red liquid, clear glass highlights, brown cork

prompts.prompt: flat iron key with ornate loop handle, viewed from above, with rust patina
prompts.hint: Should have a long shaft with teeth at one end and a decorative loop handle at the other, lying flat
prompts.colorHints: dark iron grey, orange-brown rust spots

prompts.prompt: open spell book with glowing runes on its pages and leather cover, angled to show pages and spine
prompts.hint: Should have two open pages with visible glowing symbols, a thick leather cover visible at the spine, and slight depth
prompts.colorHints: brown leather cover, cream pages, blue-green glowing runes

prompts.prompt: front-view golden crown with three gemstones set along the top band
prompts.hint: Should have a curved gold band with pointed peaks, and three coloured gemstones (centre larger than sides)
prompts.colorHints: gold band, red centre gem, blue side gems

prompts.prompt: top-down large grey boulder with cracks, moss patches, and shading for depth
prompts.hint: Should have an irregular rounded shape with shading to suggest 3D form, visible cracks, and small green moss patches
prompts.colorHints: grey stone with light/dark shading, green moss, dark crack lines

prompts.prompt: top-down green leafy tree viewed from above with irregular canopy and visible trunk centre
prompts.hint: Should have an irregular circular canopy with multiple green shades, not perfectly round, with a small brown trunk visible in the centre
prompts.colorHints: dark green, medium green, light green canopy, brown trunk

prompts.prompt: wooden barrel with two metal bands and visible wood stave grain, angled to show front and top
prompts.hint: Should have a cylindrical shape with curved wood staves, a visible top face, and two horizontal metal bands
prompts.colorHints: warm brown wood staves, grey metal bands

prompts.prompt: front-view brick wall segment with alternating brick pattern and mortar lines
prompts.hint: Should have a clear brick pattern with alternating offset rows, visible mortar lines, and slight colour variation between individual bricks
prompts.colorHints: red-brown bricks with slight variation, light grey mortar

prompts.prompt: top-down small red dragon with wings spread wide, viewed from above, with visible tail and horned head
prompts.hint: Should have a reptilian body in the centre, two spread wings on either side, a tail, and a head with horns or snout
prompts.colorHints: red scales, darker red wing membranes, yellow underbelly, orange horn tips

prompts.prompt: top-down giant green spider with eight legs spread radially and fangs visible, viewed from above
prompts.hint: Should have a round abdomen, smaller head section, eight legs radiating outward, and small visible fangs
prompts.colorHints: dark green body, lighter green leg segments, red fang tips
